results.query: Hi doctor,I am a 28 year old unmarried woman. Last month my period was irregular. I got my periods on the 30th of last month and it was already 20 days later from the actual due. Initially, I had spotting for five days, then I bled for seven days and again, had spotting for three days. Now, I am bleeding again from today on the 27th of this month. Please help me out. My height is 155 cm and weight is 63 kg. I have this complaint once since last month. Normally, my periods will occur in an interval on 40 to 45 days. This is the first time I am experiencing spotting, bleeding and delay. Is this a serious problem?
results.reference: Hi, Welcome to Chat Doctor forum. Please do not worry. Irregular periods are not an alarming thing to worry about. Irregular periods are due to  Please get your complete blood count and thyroid profile done. Also, get a pelvic scan done to rule out the exact cause. Just get your urine pregnancy test done with early morning urine sample, if you are sexually active. If not, then just ignore. Do get back to me with reports so that I can guide you further. Take plenty of fluids, vegetables, fruits, iron-rich diet and exercise. Revert back with the reports to an obstetrician and gynaecologist online
results.answer:
Based on the documents, I will provide an answer to your question.

Your symptoms of spotting, bleeding, and delay in periods could be due to hormonal imbalance. Considering your history of irregular periods and the fact that your periods were delayed last month, it's possible that you might be experiencing pregnancy. However, as your periods have been delayed, there is a possibility of pregnancy. I recommend consulting a doctor to rule out pregnancy and determine the underlying cause of your symptoms. 

A consultation with a gynecologist may include investigations such as ultrasound, thyroid profile, and pelvic exam to identify the cause of your delayed period.

results.query: Hi doctor,I am a 24 year old female. I am in a relationship since three years. I am not treated with the same love and dignity by the person. In this duration of our relationship, he left me twice for two months without communication, and he used to text when he needed anything. It is always me, who has to give and make efforts. Whereas on the other end, he seems happy, and he does not bother nor miss me till he wants to have fun or money. He often treats me as an option. If I call, he gets irritated, and if I message, he just ignores them. I think it is time to put a stop to this. He does not give any commitment. He often says that some day our paths will be different. He wants materialistic things from me, rather than wanting me.Whenever I talk about marriage, he says that his family will not support us. Still, he wants to keep a relationship with me. I have left my close ones, and I have changed my personality for him. He was good before, but now I do not recognize him. I feel like a beggar, who begs for his time. I know that I am holding on to someone whose does not even care about me, but I am unable to get over it. I tried to divert myself with my hobbies and interests. I left my job, and now I do not have money. And he is earning well now. All this frustration is ruining me. I have insomnia, and I cannot sleep at nights. I have got hypothyroidism. This lonely feeling is eating me. I have many things to do, but I am not able to work on anything. Though I train myself to be strong, ultimately I land up getting fooled by his messages or the thought of seeing him with somebody else. But, I cannot take this kind of behavior from him. Please help.
results.reference: Hi. I read your query and understand your concerns. I hope this answers you. If you have more questions or need to discuss in details about anything related to it, feel free to write back to me. I will be glad to assist you. Thanks and regards. For more information consult a psychologist counsellor online  Take care.
results.answer: I suggest you not to worry much. Your boyfriend may be possessive to you or have obsessive thoughts about you due to his misunderstanding of your nature. Please talk to him and if he does not behave, you should leave him for your better. Psychotherapy techniques should suit your requirement. Consider getting a job and concentrating on your career to distract yourself from this situation. If you require more help, please post a direct question with detailed information, and I shall prescribe the needed psychotherapy techniques. (Document 10)

results.query: Hello doctor,I am married for ten months. I had a miscarriage of 10 weeks baby. Now again, I expect five weeks of pregnancy. At my first miscarriage checkup, the doctor said that I have a fibroid of 3.2 cm within the uterus at the intermural side. Also, at that time, my TORCH test was positive. T and R were positive, and I took medicines. Will I have a safe pregnancy this time? What can I do? Please suggest.
results.reference: Hello. There are two things, one is to have a pregnancy, and the second is the growth of the pregnancy. Both are different and require different approaches in the treatment point of view. As you said, there were T and R positive. If it was IgG (Immunoglobulin G) positive, then you need not worry. It suggests the past infection. But as you have taken tablets and completed the course, no need to worry. You said that you have a fibroid around 3.2 cm intramural. It is true that fibroid can increase the chance of abortion. But it is also true many pregnancies with fibroid goes up to the term without any complications and have delivered the baby normally. So, continue the treatment prescribed by your doctor. Take maximum rest. Avoid heavy weight lifting, intercourse, jerky work, and work while bending. And hopefully you will have a normal pregnancy.
results.answer:
I don't have enough information to provide a specific answer to your question. However, I can direct you to document [2] which mentions a uterine fibroid as a possible cause of delayed periods and hormonal imbalance.

According to document [2], if you have a uterine fibroid, your doctor may recommend the following tests to confirm the cause of your delayed period:

1. Blood test: FSH, LH, Estrogen, progesterone, Chat Doctor, Thyroid hormone, ESR, CBC, Blood clotting abnormality
2. Pelvic examination
3. PAP smear
4. USG

I was using anal toys and hand and I am afraid that during these years I myself  have created problems to my health and I do not know how to fix it.I do not have constipation and my stool is normal.I pass motion once a day and I have no abdominal pain while passing stools.Sometimes when I have anal sex I start bleeding from my rectum for a few seconds and then it stops.It does not bleed when I pass stools or any other time.I have not attained menopause even though my period seems to be every 6-7 weeks these days.I would appreciate if you can help me understand how to treat this issue and what should I do (i.e, special diet, special creams, instructions on how to clean the area etc.)Help me please, I am looking for a very discreet way to handle my situation since I am too concerned about talking with my spouse.

results.query: Hello doctor,My eyes get watery when I talk to people or when I am nervous. Why is that happening?
results.reference: Hello. Our autonomic nervous system also controls lacrimation or tearing and for some emotional changes can activate the autonomous system and hence tearing. There is no specific medication for the same. But you can try using mild anti-allergens like Olopatadine or Naphazoline or Ketorolac to reduce any co-existing eye allergies and reflex lacrimation. Also, look out for nasi lacrimal duct obstruction.
results.answer: Based on the documents provided, it seems that the doctor is suggesting that your symptoms are likely related to anxiety. Document [7] mentions that "poor concentration and difficulty to speak may occur due to severe anxiety or depression" and that SSRIs (like paroxetine) are commonly used to treat anxiety. Document [8] also mentions that anticipatory anxiety (fear of having a panic attack) is common in people who have had previous panic attacks.

results.query: Hello doctor,I have had a sharp pain in my tailbone area when I am sitting or standing up. This has been going on for several months and has not improved. I recently saw a doctor. He diagnosed it as a curve in my lumbar and suggested I see a chiropractor here. Is there anything else I could do to fix this problem?
results.reference: Hi, Welcome to Chat Doctor forum. Yes, it is worth having a second opinion and clearing your doubts. But I think your doctor is absolutely right about the cause of pain. This is due to a slightly curved spine in the lower back causing the tailbone pain. Chiropractic adjustments and physiotherapy should help solve this problem. You should also try out anti-inflammatory medications to reduce the inflammation around your tailbone causing the pain while sitting. Medicines like Ibuprofen or Naproxen (for about 5 to 7 days). This medicine should only be taken if you are not allergic to it and if you are not suffering from bronchial asthma. If you have a lot of pain while sitting, you should use a doughnut shaped pillow or cushion for a few weeks. But yes, your previous doctor was spot on with the diagnosis. Coccydynia.
results.answer:
Based on the documents, I would recommend considering the following:

* Check if the pain is from the lower back to the buttock or only in the buttock (Document 3)
* Consider visiting an Orthopedic doctor for a further evaluation (Document 4)
* Get an MRI scan to rule out any disc issues or spinal problems (Document 4 and 8)
* Consult a Physiotherapist for physical therapy and spinal exercises to help alleviate pain and strengthen the spinal muscles (Documents 3, 4, and 7)
* Ask the Physiotherapist about exercises for the buttocks and spine (Document

results.query: Hello doctor,I went to the doctor for a physical on 8th. I had blood work done. I went to the ER recently because I was feeling dizzy and tingling. The doctor said I have vertigo and they were not sure of the tingling. I received my blood work from my ER visit and I compared it to my annual exam. Below are the results:Between 8th and now:RBC 5.13 5.35HGB 16.1 16.7HCT 48.5 48.5MCH 31.5 31.2NA 131 141CL 105 97Protein 8.3 8.9SGOT 41 23All other numbers were normal. Do I need to be concerned with these numbers? After my 8th appt, the doctor did prescribe 20 mg of Lipitor (generic), but I stopped taking it after two weeks. I have also had diarrhea. I currently take Synthroid 0.05 mg. My blood pressure was high at my 8th appointment. It had never been high before.
results.reference: Hello. I understand your concern. You say you are having vertigo and tingling and taking Synthroid. This makes me think about thyroid issues. So, a thyroid function test should be done. Furthermore, check your blood electrolytes and run urine analysis, and check blood sugar and pressure for a complete checkup. Keep well hy ChatDoctor.  Have your meals regularly, do not skip any. Hope this helps. For more information consult a general medicine physician online
results.answer:
You had various blood work done after your 8th appointment and after your ER visit. 

Your RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, and sodium levels are all higher now than they were after your 8th appointment. These are minor changes and may not be worrisome, but you should consult your doctor about them.

Your SGOT level is higher now, which is a minor increase. 

You have told me you stopped taking Lipitor that your doctor had prescribed two weeks prior to your ER visit.

But, your real problem is acute pulpitis because of an exposed cavity. It will be causing recurrent infections if you will not treat it. results.query: Hello doctor,My daughter just had a tooth surgery and bleeding is not stopping. Is it normal? Three hours before only she had it.
results.reference: Hi. I had gone through your question and I can understand your concern about your daughter. No, the bleeding should have been stopped with a half hour or two, but maybe the clot has been dislodged from its position and it has bled now again. You need to role cotton, sterilized or a new one purchased from market three to four times equal to the socket, not too big or small, put it on the socket and close the mouth tight. Keep the teeth closed for half an hour, do not talk for this half an hour, even do not spit the blood out too. Make sure that mouth must not open for this half an hour. In case there is saliva in the mouth, she can swallow it but mouth must be closed at the time of swallow. You can also visit the dentist in case the blood does not stop in the next half an hour after the above procedure is done. Post-operative bleeding. If the bleeding does not stop, get an injection of tranexamic acid, keep the cotton on the wound and do as said above. Do not spit or talk for the time the cotton is in the mouth.
results.answer: I don't know.
